property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-26\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;c:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-26\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\maven\bin;c:\Users\Juanita\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.58.5\bundled\scripts\noConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: runScenario["User authentication with valid credentials", "Optional[Check Room Availability API]"](1)
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: runScenario["Check room availability for specific dates", "Optional[Check Room Availability API]"](2)
testcase.system-out:
@RoomManagement @checkRoomAvailability @HotelBookingAPI @api @regression @positive @RM_4 Scenario Outline: Check room availability for specific dates # src/test/resources/features/checkRoomAvailability.feature:34 Request method: GET Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/room?checkin=2026-07-17&checkout=2026-07-18 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: checkin=2026-07-17 checkout=2026-07-18 Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Sun, 29 Mar 2026 02:16:17 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare vary: rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch x-railway-edge: railway/asia-southeast1-eqsg3a x-railway-request-id: TdzL0fEiRgKOHhXPacI7Nw x-railway-cdn-edge: fastly/cache-sin-wsap440058-SIN x-cache: MISS x-cache-hits: 0 x-served-by: cache-sin-wsap440058-SIN cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=YAzR4F42rQruMcxE0MMDVL1wakXKgf%2BBruPogIKv8rBz3Hw3AA7YcA5G%2F2%2BIt7L3MELOF5BChMn9wuytn10UO8kWlMw1wOV0yVHmP4Ps6FPhYGNz0HHNJ6v2YXVU4jj8YGdT%2Ba6lsE9P2Vbhlg%3D%3D"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9e3b5f209ab0fd7d-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "rooms": [ { "roomid": 1, "roomName": "101", "type": "Single", "accessible": true, "image": "/images/room1.jpg", "description": "Aenean porttitor mauris sit amet lacinia molestie. In posuere accumsan aliquet. Maecenas sit amet nisl massa. Interdum et malesuada fames ac ante.", "features": [ "TV", "WiFi", "Safe" ], "roomPrice": 100 }, { "roomid": 2, "roomName": "102", "type": "Double", "accessible": true, "image": "/images/room2.jpg", "description": "Vestibulum sollicitudin, lectus ac mollis consequat, lorem orci ultrices tellus, eleifend euismod tortor dui egestas erat. Phasellus et ipsum nisl. ", "features": [ "TV", "Radio", "Safe" ], "roomPrice": 150 }, { "roomid": 3, "roomName": "103", "type": "Suite", "accessible": true, "image": "/images/room3.jpg", "description": "Etiam metus metus, fringilla ac sagittis id, consequat vel neque. Nunc commodo quis nisl nec posuere. Etiam at accumsan ex. ", "features": [ "Radio", "WiFi", "Safe" ], "roomPrice": 225 } ] } When User requests to check room availability with checkin "2026-07-17" and checkout "2026-07-18" # com.booking.stepDefinitions.RoomManagementAPI.User_requests_to_check_room_availability_with_checkin_and_checkout(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then API response status code of RM should be 200 # com.booking.stepDefinitions.RoomManagementAPI.API_response_status_code_should_be(int) And Response should contain available rooms # com.booking.stepDefinitions.RoomManagementAPI.Response_should_contain_available_rooms() And Available rooms list should not be empty # com.booking.stepDefinitions.RoomManagementAPI.Available_rooms_list_should_not_be_empty()

Nunc commodo quis nisl nec posuere. Etiam at accumsan ex. ", "features": [ "Radio", "WiFi", "Safe" ], "roomPrice": 225 } ] } When User requests to check room availability with checkin "2026-07-01" and checkout "2026-08-05" # com.booking.stepDefinitions.RoomManagementAPI.User_requests_to_check_room_availability_with_checkin_and_checkout(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then API response status code of RM should be 200 # com.booking.stepDefinitions.RoomManagementAPI.API_response_status_code_should_be(int) And Response should contain available rooms # com.booking.stepDefinitions.RoomManagementAPI.Response_should_contain_available_rooms() And Available rooms list should not be empty # com.booking.stepDefinitions.RoomManagementAPI.Available_rooms_list_should_not_be_empty()

testcase.name: runScenario["Check room availability for specific dates", "Optional[Check Room Availability API]"](6)
testcase.system-out:
@RoomManagement @checkRoomAvailability @HotelBookingAPI @api @regression @positive @RM_4 Scenario Outline: Check room availability for specific dates # src/test/resources/features/checkRoomAvailability.feature:38 Request method: GET Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/room?checkin=2026-07-17&checkout=2026-07-17 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: checkin=2026-07-17 checkout=2026-07-17 Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Sun, 29 Mar 2026 02:16:20 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare vary: rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch x-railway-edge: railway/asia-southeast1-eqsg3a x-railway-request-id: nGLUPn9JRqKPUarIoB_USg x-railway-cdn-edge: fastly/cache-sin-wsap440058-SIN x-cache: MISS x-cache-hits: 0 x-served-by: cache-sin-wsap440058-SIN cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=SsoCxbR%2F5Cb39zk8YHBBcvMoH79uW3pUbyPXcmhuigDqRMT10%2BBJcbm12Ii71hLV6twmq6hYlE23t6HGd%2F32w67GSum5UrTCmTlI%2BnoCRBMM0kpL7NsoQ4rDBqpE5EcPr0mgW5GD1TpUm5u0HA%3D%3D"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9e3b5f348a5cfd8d-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "rooms": [ { "roomid": 1, "roomName": "101", "type": "Single", "accessible": true, "image": "/images/room1.jpg", "description": "Aenean porttitor mauris sit amet lacinia molestie. In posuere accumsan aliquet. Maecenas sit amet nisl massa. Interdum et malesuada fames ac ante.", "features": [ "TV", "WiFi", "Safe" ], "roomPrice": 100 }, { "roomid": 2, "roomName": "102", "type": "Double", "accessible": true, "image": "/images/room2.jpg", "description": "Vestibulum sollicitudin, lectus ac mollis consequat, lorem orci ultrices tellus, eleifend euismod tortor dui egestas erat. Phasellus et ipsum nisl. ", "features": [ "TV", "Radio", "Safe" ], "roomPrice": 150 }, { "roomid": 3, "roomName": "103", "type": "Suite", "accessible": true, "image": "/images/room3.jpg", "description": "Etiam metus metus, fringilla ac sagittis id, consequat vel neque. Nunc commodo quis nisl nec posuere. Etiam at accumsan ex. ", "features": [ "Radio", "WiFi", "Safe" ], "roomPrice": 225 } ] } When User requests to check room availability with checkin "2026-07-17" and checkout "2026-07-17" # com.booking.stepDefinitions.RoomManagementAPI.User_requests_to_check_room_availability_with_checkin_and_checkout(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then API response status code of RM should be 200 # com.booking.stepDefinitions.RoomManagementAPI.API_response_status_code_should_be(int) And Response should contain available rooms # com.booking.stepDefinitions.RoomManagementAPI.Response_should_contain_available_rooms() And Available rooms list should not be empty # com.booking.stepDefinitions.RoomManagementAPI.Available_rooms_list_should_not_be_empty()

testcase.name: runScenario["Check room availability with invalid date formats and ranges", "Optional[Check Room Availability API]"](7)

failure.message: Response status code mismatch. Expected: 400 Actual: 200 Body: {"rooms":[{"roomid":1,"roomName":"101","type":"Single","accessible":true,"image":"/images/room1.jpg","description":"Aenean porttitor mauris sit amet lacinia molestie. In posuere accumsan aliquet. Maecenas sit amet nisl massa. Interdum et malesuada fames ac ante.","features":["TV","WiFi","Safe"],"roomPrice":100},{"roomid":2,"roomName":"102","type":"Double","accessible":true,"image":"/images/room2.jpg","description":"Vestibulum sollicitudin, lectus ac mollis consequat, lorem orci ultrices tellus, eleifend euismod tortor dui egestas erat. Phasellus et ipsum nisl. ","features":["TV","Radio","Safe"],"roomPrice":150},{"roomid":3,"roomName":"103","type":"Suite","accessible":true,"image":"/images/room3.jpg","description":"Etiam metus metus, fringilla ac sagittis id, consequat vel neque. Nunc commodo quis nisl nec posuere. Etiam at accumsan ex. ","features":["Radio","WiFi","Safe"],"roomPrice":225}]} expected [400] but found [200]
